name: Linguine Carbonara#1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart saucepan, bring 4 quarts of water to a boil. Add linguine and return to a boil. Cook linguine for 8-10 minutes or until done to your taste.
2. When the linguine is drained and set aside, prepare the sauce. Place butter and Parmesan cheese in a large skillet. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon, until butter melts and is thoroughly combined with cheese.
3. Reduce heat to low. Add drained linguine. Toss to coat with butter and cheese mixture. Add eggs all at once and toss with wooden spoons until eggs are just cooked. Immediately remove from skillet. Transfer linguine to a warmed platter and sprinkle with parsley.
